steps.title: Apply the margin of error
steps.content:
A margin of error gives a range around the sample mean. With mean $52$ and margin of error $4$, the range is
$$
52-4 \text{ to } 52+4
$$

steps.title: Find the interval
steps.content: Compute the endpoints. $$ 52-4=48 $$ $$ 52+4=56 $$ The most appropriate conclusion is that the population mean is between $48$ and $56$. The answer is C.
